findings.title: AI Code Analysis Complete
findings.description: Groq analyzed your page HTML and generated improvement recommendations. See the fix plan below.

summary: The website appears to be visually reliable and well-structured, with no issues found on the desktop view.
bundled_fix_prompt:
Fix the layout and styling issues on the AiBreaker website by making the following changes: 

On the homepage, update the `header` element with the class `hide-mobile-nav` to display none on mobile devices (max-width: 768px) and update the `button` element with the class `show-mobile-nav` to display flex on mobile devices. 

Update the `nav` element with the class `hide-mobile-nav` to change the `display` property to none on mobile devices and update the `button` element with the class `show-mobile-nav` to change the `display` property to flex on mobile devices. 

For the demo page, update the `div` element with the class `card` to add a max-width of 280px on desktop devices (min-width: 1280px) and update the `h1` element to change the font-size to 28px on mobile devices (max-width: 390px). 

On the pricing page, update the `div` elements with the class `card` to add a margin-bottom of 20px on desktop devices and update the `a` elements with the class `btn btn-ghost` to change the width to 100% on mobile devices. 

Update all `button` elements with the class `btn btn-primary-lg` to change the width to 100% on mobile devices and update all `a` elements with the class `btn btn-ghost` to change the width to 100% on mobile devices. 

Finally, update the CSS to include media queries for desktop (min-width: 1280px) and mobile (max-width: 390px) devices to ensure the changes are applied correctly.
